## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] ci: CI/CD
- [ ] chore: Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Commits follow conventional commit format
- [ ] New types exported from `src/index.ts` barrel
